tasks.task: Identify top competitors in the industry.
Research and gather information on competitor ads, including platforms used, messaging, visuals, and target audience.
Analyze competitor ad performance metrics, such as engagement rates, click-through rates, and conversion rates.
Compare competitor ads to your own ads to identify strengths and weaknesses.
Develop a strategy based on the analysis to improve your own ad campaigns and stay competitive in the market.

Day 1: Identify top competitors in the industry.

Day 5: Develop a strategy based on the analysis to improve your own ad campaigns and stay competitive in the market.
